GROW WITH RASINDU
EPOXY RESIN TABLE MAKING VIDEOS
–  GUIDE
JOIN OUR TELEGRAM CHANNEL👉 GrowWithRasindu
JOIN OUR WHATSAPP CHANNEL👉 GrowWithRasindu

👉 nas.io/growwithrasindu
This guide is written in simple English.If you prefer to read this in your own language,copy this entire guide and paste it into ChatGPT.Then type: "Translate this into [your language]"and it will give you the full guide in your language.
මෙම මාර්ගෝපදේශය සරල ඉංග්‍රීසියෙන් ලියා ඇත.ඔබට ඔබේ භාෂාවෙන් කියවීමට අවශ්‍ය නම්,
මෙම සම්පූර්ණ මාර්ගෝපදේශය copy කර ChatGPT වෙත paste කරන්න.එවිට මෙසේ type කරන්න: "Translate this into Sinhala"එවිට ඔබට සිංහල භාෂාවෙන් සම්පූර්ණ මාර්ගෝපදේශය ලැබෙනු ඇත.
यह गाइड सरल अंग्रेजी में लिखी गई है।अगर आप इसे अपनी भाषा में पढ़ना चाहते हैं,तो इस पूरी गाइड को copy करके ChatGPT में paste करें।फिर टाइप करें: "Translate this into Hindi"और आपको पूरी गाइड हिंदी में मिल जाएगी।
هذا الدليل مكتوب باللغة الإنجليزية البسيطة.
إذا كنت تفضل قراءته بلغتك الخاصة،
انسخ هذا الدليل كاملاً والصقه في ChatGPT.
ثم اكتب: "Translate this into Arabic"
وستحصل على الدليل كاملاً باللغة العربية.
HOW TO USE THIS SYSTEM (Step-by-Step Guide)
PHASE 1: GENERATE YOUR PROMPTS
Step 1 — Copy the Master Prompt
Copy the entire "MASTER PROMPT" section below. Paste it into Claude, ChatGPT, or any AI chat.
Step 2 — Answer the Questions
The AI will ask you 5 questions one by one. Select one option for each:
Character — Select the craftsman who builds the table (5 options)
Workshop — Select the workshop style (5 options)
Table Shape — Select the table shape (5 options)
Table Design — Select what goes inside the resin table (10 options)
Final Room — Select where the finished table is revealed (5 options)
Step 3 — Collect Your Prompts
After answering all questions, the AI will give you:
7 Image Prompts
7 Video Animation Prompts
All prompts are copy-paste ready inside code blocks.
PHASE 2: GENERATE YOUR IMAGES (Google Flow / Nanobanana2)
Step 4 — Generate IMAGE 01
Copy IMAGE 01 prompt
Go to Google Flow (or Nanobanana2) and paste
Generate IMAGE 01 (empty mold)
Step 5 — Generate IMAGE 02
Add the IMAGE 01 output as a reference image in the chat
Copy and paste IMAGE 02 prompt
Generate IMAGE 02 (objects arranged inside mold)
Step 6 — Generate IMAGE 03
Add the IMAGE 02 output as a reference image
Copy and paste IMAGE 03 prompt
Generate IMAGE 03 (resin poured over objects)
Step 7 — Generate IMAGE 04
Add the IMAGE 03 output as a reference image
Copy and paste IMAGE 04 prompt
Generate IMAGE 04 (cured matte haze)
Step 8 — Generate IMAGE 05
Add the IMAGE 04 output as a reference image
Copy and paste IMAGE 05 prompt
Generate IMAGE 05 (rim removed, still matte)
Step 9 — Generate IMAGE 06
Add the IMAGE 05 output as a reference image
Copy and paste IMAGE 06 prompt
Generate IMAGE 06 (polished mirror shine)
Step 10 — Generate IMAGE 07
Add the IMAGE 06 output as a reference image
Copy and paste IMAGE 07 prompt
Generate IMAGE 07 (finished table in final room)
PHASE 3: GENERATE YOUR VIDEO CLIPS (Google Veo / Seedance)
Step 11 — Generate VIDEO CLIP 01
Add IMAGE 01 as Start Frame
Add IMAGE 02 as End Frame
Copy and paste CLIP 01 video prompt
Generate the video (arranging objects inside mold)
Step 12 — Generate VIDEO CLIP 02
Add IMAGE 02 as Start Frame
Add IMAGE 03 as End Frame
Copy and paste CLIP 02 video prompt
Generate the video (pouring resin over objects)
Step 13 — Generate VIDEO CLIP 03
Add IMAGE 03 as Start Frame
Add IMAGE 04 as End Frame
Copy and paste CLIP 03 video prompt
Generate the video (curing timelapse)
Step 14 — Generate VIDEO CLIP 04
Add IMAGE 04 as Start Frame
Add IMAGE 05 as End Frame
Copy and paste CLIP 04 video prompt
Generate the video (rim removal step by step)
Step 15 — Generate VIDEO CLIP 05
Add IMAGE 05 as Start Frame
Add IMAGE 06 as End Frame
Copy and paste CLIP 05 video prompt
Generate the video (polishing to mirror shine)
Step 16 — Generate VIDEO CLIP 06
Add IMAGE 06 as Start Frame
Add IMAGE 07 as End Frame
Copy and paste CLIP 06 video prompt
Generate the video (carry to room + place on legs with camera cuts)
Step 17 — Generate VIDEO CLIP 07
Add IMAGE 07 as Start Frame ONLY (no End Frame for this clip)
Copy and paste CLIP 07 video prompt
Generate the video (final room showcase hero shot)
PHASE 4: EDIT YOUR FINAL VIDEO (CapCut)
Step 18 — Import to CapCut
Download all 7 video clips
Open CapCut and create a new project
Import all 7 clips
Step 19 — Arrange in Correct Order
Place clips on the timeline in this order:
CLIP 07 — First 2 seconds only (hook/thumbnail to grab attention)
CLIP 01 — Arranging objects
CLIP 02 — Pouring resin
CLIP 03 — Curing timelapse
CLIP 04 — Rim removal
CLIP 05 — Polishing
CLIP 06 — Carry to room + place on legs
CLIP 07 — Full version (ending reveal)
Step 20 — Add Background Music
Add a satisfying ASMR lo-fi instrumental track
Match the music mood to the final room reveal
Step 21 — Export & Upload
Export in 9:16 vertical format
Upload to Facebook Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts
REPEAT FOR UNLIMITED CONTENT
Run this system again — the AI generates completely new random options every time. Different character, workshop, shape, design, and room combinations create unlimited unique videos. Generate 3-5 variations per week to build a massive content library.
Grow with Rasindu
